postReview.title: Ramsay revels after Minnesota claim historic maiden victory in Seattle
postReview.description: Minnesota United claimed their first ever away win against the Seattle Sounders, having never previously registered a point at Lumen Field.

preReview.title: Seattle Sounders v Minnesota United: Ferreira hopes San Diego goal is the first of many
preReview.description: The Seattle Sounders host Minnesota United this weekend on the back of a 1-0 victory over San Diego in midweek, with Jesus Ferreira scoring.

QAData.question: Who won between Seattle Sounders FC and Minnesota United on Sun, 01 Jun 2025 22:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Minnesota United won 3–2 over Seattle Sounders FC on Sun, 01 Jun 2025 22:00:00 GMT.
